title: MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS - 211info
text: CLEARVIEW DISABILITY RESOURCE CENTER MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gently used medical equipment, such as walkers, canes, wheelchairs, bath seats and more. Accepts donations of clean and functional equipment. Does not accept items such as lift chairs, knee or back braces, orthopedic boots, medical beds, CPAP's or nebulizers. 1114 SW Frazer Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 276-1130 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 276-1130 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or visit website for more information. Applicants must complete and sign medical equipment loan agreement. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Morrow and Umatilla Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of SW 12th and Frazer. Services: General Medical Equipment/Supplies Provision Medical Equipment/Assistive Technology Donation Programs Walking Aids Wheelchairs/Wheeled Mobility Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - DISABILITY RESOURCE CENTER TRANSPORTATION - TRANSPORTATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLEARVIEW DISABILITY RESOURCE CENTER
